meta.title: Richard Weitz on the "Year of Decision" in Afghanistan
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis, Richard Weitz, discusses the importance of the upcoming year in the future of Afghanistan. With NATO countries due to remove troops in 2011, the next year is very important in the development of the country.
